title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 80 Prospect Street in Avon, New York, as the "Officer Anthony Mazurkiewicz Memorial Post Office Building".
plain_summary: This bill changes the name of a post office building in Avon, New York. The post office is located at 80 Prospect Street. It will now be called the Officer Anthony Mazurkiewicz Memorial Post Office Building to honor Officer Anthony Mazurkiewicz. All government papers and documents must use this new name when talking about this post office building.
last_action_text: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.

sections.title: Section 1  Officer Anthony Mazurkiewicz Memorial Post Office Building
sections.text: The United States Postal Service building located at eighty Prospect Street in Avon, New York will now be called the Officer Anthony Mazurkiewicz Memorial Post Office Building. From now on, whenever any law, map, rule, document, paper, or other official United States record mentions this post office building, it must use this new memorial name.
